metadata.description: Agent-era engineering skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Ten gated, agent-era engineering skills as one suite — spanning the software lifecycle: requirements (groundwork), architecture (load-bearing), engineering process (flightline), testing (assay), deployment & operations (stationkeeping), maintenance & evolution (husbandry); plus four cross-cutting lenses: the feedback surface (gauge), code craft (plumb), and the security pair — shield (aegis) and spear (gungnir). Each is a multi-stage gated flow, tuned for a world where agents write much of the code. Installs every skill under the /engineering: prefix. Note: the gates are enforced by the `checklist` CLI, which installs separately — see the repository README.
